65: While I consider myself well versed in various magicks, I would be ill advised to assume the duties of keyward without instruction. That being said, if I were to learn more of interment and its inner workings, perhaps...

While I consider myself well versed in various magicks, I would be ill-advised to assume the duties of keyward without instruction. That being said, if I were to learn more of interment and its inner workings, perhaps...
